#### Description

Why use p and q when I can use more?Connect with nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 65006.
### solucion 
```
─(aleja㉿Laptop)-[/mnt/c/Users/aleja]
└─$ nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 65006.
c: 
n: 
e: 65537

┌──(aleja㉿Laptop)-[/mnt/c/Users/aleja]
└─$ python3 b00tl3gRSA3.py
picoCTF{too_many_fact0rs_3023548}
```
### Codigo 
```


e=65537
tn = 


d = pow(e, -1, tn)
m = pow(c, d, n)

flag = bytes.fromhex(hex(m)[2:]).decode()

print(flag)
```
